description: A relevance-scoped directory of rope-bondage resources supplied by the project owner on 2026-07-13.

selection_policy.instructional_sites: Collect public pages that materially help answer rope-bondage questions; do not mirror unrelated pages.
selection_policy.commerce_sites: Collect only the supplied product or category page and narrowly relevant rope specifications, care, or ordering information.
selection_policy.event_sites: Retain the resource identity and useful public event or education pages, but label schedules, prices, and availability as volatile.
selection_policy.content_signals: Obey robots.txt and Content-Signal directives. A reference-only resource still belongs in recommendation QA, but its content must not be copied into training data.
selection_policy.videos: Collect the public title, description, and creator-provided transcript or captions when available; never bypass login or payment controls.
